name: md-bridge
description: Self-hosted document converter built on hand-written heuristics. Ships PDF and Markdown conversion today; the architecture welcomes new format pairs as contributions land. Deterministic by design.

scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:api && npm run test:unit:regression && npm run test:unit:web
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:api && npm run test:integration:regression && npm run test:integration:web
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
